item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested new giveaway handling port, recognizes the prior three cases as repeated local reroutes, moves the diagnosis upstream to intake/routing rules rather than window count, and proposes consolidation into a unified service entry or appointment rule. It permits only a tightly bounded same-day emergency exception and rejects making the new channel permanent, so the fail signal is not observed."}
